scripts.pot: wp-env run cli wp i18n make-pot /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/WP_image_usage_audit /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/WP_image_usage_audit/languages/image-usage-audit.pot --domain=image-usage-audit --exclude=.agents,docs,tests,vendor,node_modules,scripts,dist
scripts.plugin-check: wp-env run cli wp plugin install plugin-check --activate && wp-env run cli wp plugin check WP_image_usage_audit
